title: stenotaenia macrocarpa subsp. macrocarpa
intro: Stenotaenia macrocarpa subsp. macrocarpa, also known as the Indian pennywort, is a plant species in the family Apiaceae, native to India. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antioxidant effects, which contribute to its health benefits such as reducing fever, treating wounds, and alleviating digestive issues. The plant can be prepared into various herbal preparations, such as infusions, decoctions, and ointments, to harness its medicinal properties. Overall, Stenotaenia macrocarpa subsp. macrocarpa has been utilized in traditional medicine for its potential to promote overall well-being and alleviate various health conditions.
